jobDescription: Who are Meta Pack? No we are not a packaging company – that’s Tetra Pack! We are a tech company that works with a lot of the world’s biggest ecommerce players to integrate them with over 450 carriers around the world to make delivery easy. We are a multi-tenant Saa S platform. We give them the platform to help consumers decide their delivery preference and track the parcel’s progress whilst also providing the retailer with intelligent smart decisions about how to send the parcel – all underpinned with lots of data. We work with well-known global retailers and major brands such as ASOS, Adidas, Burberry, John Lewis, Boohoo, e Bay, and Zalando. In fact we work with so many retailers and carriers it’s highly likely that you’ve interacted with us at some point when ordering goods online! In August 2018, we were acquired by Fortune 100’s 2nd fastest growing company, stamps.com. We have super ambitious and exciting plans all centred around our tech. Meta Pack will play a role in shipping around 600 million parcels in 2018 and with the wider stamps.com family the number rises to 2.5bn parcels. Meta Pack has been growing at 40% year on year over the last 5 years and continues to grow at a rapid rate. Why would I want to be an System Analyst at Meta Pack? You'll be part of Software Engineering team and responsible for optimizing the work of the development team by analyzing the product requirements in the form of " User Stories", tasks on the backlog or other commonly accepted forms. After analyzing these requirements, further activities are planned together with the team. You'll proactively support decision-making process and discussions, make sure that the team maintains smooth and effective communication. What would I be doing? Preparation of system customer requirements based on product analysis Responsibility for the timeliness and transparency of the backlog Cooperation with other departments of the company consisting in providing all necessary information at every stage of project creation Working in accordance with the values ​​of AGILE methodologies Active acquisition of business knowledge related to modules, carriers and logistics processes Ensuring project support, implementation of research and analytical elements Planning and presenting new functionalities in accordance with the requirements Providing the team with knowledge in the form of data migration rules, business rules Responsibility for the substantive part of the description of the solution for the client Estimate the resources needed to meet functional and non-functional requirements Who are you? Strong communicator with excellent analytical skills Fluent English speaker Able to work on your own initiative with limited supervision Excellent time management and organisational acumen Pro-active thinker and problem solver Able to manage multiple clients and projects/tasks simultaneously Have the capability to manage client expectations Strong troubleshooter: You will be responsible for detecting potential issues and implementing solutions when issues threaten to delay the timeline or impact budget or business operation What are the perks?max. 30 days holiday (increasing based on length of service once you have been with us for 2 years) Work in a great atmosphere, with people who like what they do and are willing to share their knowledge Private medical healthcare Discounted gym membership Training budget Free language courses - English, German, Spanish Fresh fruit, snacks and drinks Relax/game room Hardware budget to let you get what you need Dynamic, open culture with lots of social activities
